remarks: Welcome to a rare opportunity offering a beautifully renovated charming single-family home, ideally situated in one of the area's most desirable coastal communities. Whether you're seeking a primary residence, a multi-generational living arrangement, a lucrative investment property, or the perfect weekend retreat, this versatile home delivers modern comfort, flexibility, and an exceptional lifestyle just moments from the shoreline. The main-level residence features a bright and inviting two-bedroom, one-bath layout with hardwood floors throughout, 8'3" ceilings, and oversized windows that fill the home with natural light. The renovated kitchen boasts quartz countertops, crisp white cabinetry, stainless steel appliances, a dishwasher, microwave, and abundant storage. Additional highlights include an in-unit washer and dryer, spacious bedrooms with generous closet space, and direct access from the primary bedroom to a stunning private deck overlooking the professionally landscaped backyard. Perfect for morning coffee, outdoor dining, entertaining, or relaxing at sunset, this outdoor retreat enhances everyday living. The upper-level residence offers an equally impressive one-bedroom, one-bath layout with an open-concept design, hardwood flooring, soaring 10-foot ceilings, oversized windows, and ceiling fans throughout. The stylish kitchen is appointed with quartz countertops, elegant cream cabinetry, stainless steel appliances, a dishwasher, microwave,
